CAREERS AT TRAI INC

Build what matters. Ship what scales.

We're a team of engineers, designers, and product thinkers who believe great software changes everything. If you're passionate about clean code, scalable systems, and solving hard problems — we want to hear from you.

ENGINEERING CULTURE

How We Work

🚀

Ship Fast, Ship Right

We move quickly without cutting corners. CI/CD, code reviews, and automated testing are non-negotiable.

🎯

Own the Outcome

Every engineer owns their feature end-to-end — from architecture to deployment to monitoring.

🧠

Stay Curious

We invest in R&D time, conference talks, and open-source contributions. Learning never stops.

🏗️

Build for Scale

We design systems to handle 10x growth from day one. Performance and reliability are first-class citizens.

WHY JOIN TRAI

Perks & Benefits

💻

Top-tier Equipment

MacBook Pro, 4K monitors, and all the tools you need

📚

Learning Budget

Annual stipend for courses, conferences, and certifications

🌍

Remote-first

Work from anywhere — we're distributed by default

⏳

Flexible Hours

Async-friendly culture. Results over hours.

💰

Competitive Rates

Project-based pay benchmarked to senior-level freelance rates, paid on milestones

📈

Career Growth

Clear IC and management tracks with mentorship

🔁

Steady Project Pipeline

Consistent freelance opportunities across a growing client base, not one-off gigs

OPEN POSITIONS

For Students: Internship Program

Are you a student or recent grad? Apply below to kickstart your career by building real AI products under senior mentorship.

AI Agent & Prompt Engineer Intern

Remote Internship

Master Agentic AI and enterprise automation. Build custom RAG pipelines, design complex system prompts, and orchestrate autonomous AI agents using cutting-edge frameworks.

Apply for Internship
Apply Now — Hear Back in 3 Days

For Experts: Freelance Network

Are you an experienced professional? We do not hire full-time employees. Instead, we partner with elite freelancers for project-based contracts. Send your CV/Portfolio to join our network.

AI Solutions Architect

Remote Freelance / Contract

Partner with us on a project basis to design end-to-end AI solutions, generative AI integrations, and custom ML models.

Apply Now

AI Agent Orchestrator

Remote Freelance / Contract

Take on specialized freelance contracts building multi-agent AI systems, voice agents, and lead scraping bots.

Apply Now

Senior Full-Stack Engineer

Remote Freelance / Contract

Join our network for high-impact web development projects across React, Node.js, and headless CMS platforms.

Apply Now

Mobile App Developer (Flutter/Native)

Remote Freelance / Contract

Freelance opportunities to build scalable iOS and Android applications for our enterprise clients.

Apply Now

Cloud & DevOps Engineer

Remote Freelance / Contract

Architect and manage AWS/GCP infrastructure, Kubernetes clusters, and automated CI/CD pipelines.

Apply Now

Data Engineer / Analyst

Remote Freelance / Contract

Design scalable data pipelines, ETL workflows, and real-time Power BI/Tableau dashboards.

Apply Now

UI/UX & Brand Designer

Remote Freelance / Contract

Craft premium user interfaces in Figma, conduct user research, and build comprehensive brand identity systems.

Apply Now

Motion Graphics & 3D Artist

Remote Freelance / Contract

Create stunning product demos, Lottie animations, and 3D architectural renders for modern web platforms.

Apply Now

SEO & Growth Strategist

Remote Freelance / Contract

Drive digital growth through Technical SEO, Generative Engine Optimization, and paid ad campaigns.

Apply Now

Technical Content Copywriter

Remote Freelance / Contract

Write high-converting SaaS copy, SEO blog strategies, and thought leadership articles for tech brands.

Apply Now

Enterprise CRM/ERP Specialist

Remote Freelance / Contract

Consult and implement custom CRM systems, Salesforce/HubSpot migrations, and supply chain ERPs.

Apply Now

Cybersecurity & Compliance Consultant

Remote Freelance / Contract

Conduct penetration testing and guide clients through SOC 2, HIPAA, and GDPR compliance audits.

Apply Now

App Store Publishing & Compliance Expert

Remote Freelance / Contract

Manage end-to-end publishing, ASO, and strict compliance for iOS, Android, and Windows apps across all business categories (Fintech, Health, E-commerce).

Apply Now
Email Portfolio to hello@traiinc.com →

QUESTIONS & ANSWERS

Frequently Asked Questions

No. Trai Inc operates as a freelance-first agency. We partner with elite independent professionals on project-based contracts with competitive milestone-based pay.

We respond to all applications within 3 business days. Shortlisted candidates receive a brief technical assessment followed by a 30-minute culture call.

Interns work on real client projects under senior mentorship for 2-3 months. You'll ship production code, learn enterprise AI workflows, and receive a certificate plus a recommendation letter upon completion.

Ready to build with us?

Join a network of elite freelancers shipping production code for India's fastest-growing companies.

Send Your Portfolio →
